message:
refactor(ftui-runtime): abstract event source behind BackendEventSource trait (bd-lff4p.3.2)

Program is now generic over E: BackendEventSource instead of owning a
concrete TerminalSession. A CrosstermEventSource adapter wraps the
existing session for backwards-compatible construction. This decouples
the runtime from crossterm and enables future backend swaps (ftui-tty
native, ftui-web WASM).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
